title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.511 - Christopher S. 'Kit' Bond Highway designated for a portion of Bus. Rte 54 in the City of Mexico
text:
227.511.  Christopher S. 'Kit' Bond Highway designated for a portion of Bus. Rte 54 in the City of Mexico. — A portion of Business Route 54 within the city limits of Mexico, in Audrain County, shall be designated the "Christopher S. 'Kit' Bond Highway".  Costs for such designation shall be paid by private donation.
(L. 2012 H.B. 1807, et al.)
